Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to understand the strict normative rules and the desiderata recommended but not strict conditions

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Normative Rules Strict Sequence must be Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Desiderata Recommended but Not Strict Credit Check should be completed within 24 hours of application Applicant should be informed within 48 hours of loan decision A Follow up Call is encouraged before closing the case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Normative check All steps are present Order is correct Since approved Finalize Documentation is before Close Case correct No skipped steps or reversed order

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Desiderata check Credit Check within 24 hours meets desideratum Inform Applicant within 48 hours of loan decision meets desideratum Follow up Call Not present in the log fails desideratum

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Order violation Risk Assessment occurs before Credit Check The rule states Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment This is a clear violation Finalize Documentation after rejection is explicitly not allowed

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait looking back the log for Case 2 does not have Inform Applicant Missing Inform Applicant That is another normative violation because Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: So Case 2 has three normative violations Risk Assessment before Credit Check Missing Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation after rejection

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Normative check All steps are present and in the correct order The loan was approved and Finalize Documentation was done before Close Case No normative violations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Desiderata check Credit Check exceeds 24 hours fails desideratum Inform Applicant exceeds 48 hours fails desideratum Follow up Call not present fails desideratum

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now lets summarize Normative Violations Case 1 none Case 2 three violations Case 3 none

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Desiderata Violations Case 1 missing Follow up Call Case 2 missing Follow up Call Case 3 Credit Check timing Inform Applicant timing and missing Follow up Call

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Maybe the Risk Assessment was done in parallel with Credit Check but the log shows Risk Assessment before Credit Check which violates the strict order Finalize Documentation after rejection could be a mistake or system error Missing Inform Applicant could be an oversight

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The delays might be due to high workload causing delay in Credit Check Applicant was hard to reach causing delay in Inform Applicant Follow up Call was forgotten or deemed unnecessary

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Only Case 2 violates the normative rules Cases 1 and 3 adhere to all normative rules
